---
title: "`r params$title`"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
params:
  result: NULL
  title: "Phenotypic QC Report"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE,
                      fig.width = 10, fig.height = 6)
library(phenoQC)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

result <- params$result
trait_cols <- result$params$trait_cols
row_col <- result$params$row_col
col_col <- result$params$col_col
```

# Trial Overview

- **Observations:** `r nrow(result$data)`
- **Traits analysed:** `r paste(trait_cols, collapse = ", ")`
- **Outlier methods:** `r paste(result$params$outlier_methods, collapse = ", ")`
- **IQR threshold:** `r result$params$iqr_threshold`

# Structure Validation

```{r validation}
knitr::kable(result$validation, caption = "Trial structure validation results")
```

# Missing Data

```{r missing-summary}
knitr::kable(result$missing, caption = "Missing data summary")
```

```{r missing-plot, fig.cap="Missing data by trait"}
qc_missing_plot(result$data, trait_cols, type = "bar")
```

# Outlier Detection

```{r outlier-summary}
if (!is.null(result$outliers) && nrow(result$outliers) > 0) {
  knitr::kable(result$outliers, caption = "Outlier detection summary")
}
```

```{r outlier-plots, results='asis', fig.height=5}
for (trait in trait_cols) {
  cat(sprintf("\n## %s\n\n", trait))
  p <- qc_plot_outliers(result$data, trait, row_col, col_col)
  print(p)
  cat("\n\n")
}
```

# Spatial Diagnostics

```{r spatial}
if (!is.null(result$spatial) && nrow(result$spatial) > 0) {
  knitr::kable(result$spatial, caption = "Spatial trend diagnostics")
}
```

```{r spatial-plots, results='asis', fig.height=5}
for (trait in trait_cols) {
  trend_col <- paste0(trait, "_trend")
  if (trend_col %in% names(result$data)) {
    cat(sprintf("\n## %s spatial pattern\n\n", trait))
    p <- qc_plot_spatial(result$data, trait, row_col, col_col)
    print(p)
    cat("\n\n")
  }
}
```

# Summary

```{r summary-table}
knitr::kable(result$summary, caption = "Per-trait QC summary")
```

---

*Report generated by [phenoQC](https://github.com/josh45-source/phenoQC) v`r packageVersion("phenoQC")`*
